heading: Delegation and cooperation
label: 136t Delegation and cooperation
notes: Effective DateFor effective date of section, see , set out as a note under .section 4 of Pub. L. 92–516section 136 of this title

children.heading: Delegation
children.label: a Delegation
children.text: All authority vested in the Administrator by virtue of the provisions of this subchapter may with like force and effect be executed by such employees of the Environmental Protection Agency as the Administrator may designate for the purpose.

children.heading: Cooperation
children.label: b Cooperation
children.text: The Administrator shall cooperate with Department of Agriculture, any other Federal agency, and any appropriate agency of any State or any political subdivision thereof, in carrying out the provisions of this subchapter, and in securing uniformity of regulations.
